text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while eating with Symboli Rudolf...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah... That was delectable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see that she's folded her hamburger wrapper
into a neat square. There isn't a single stain
around her mouth either.
choice_data_list:
Wow, you don't make a mess even when eating
burgers.

Wow, you don't make a mess even when eating
burgers.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is that unusual?
choice_data_list:
It's usually not quite so pretty for the rest of
us...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I point out that her table manners are impeccable
when she eats, to which she replies...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha... If you ever happen to meet any of my
older siblings, you'll be even more surprised.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They are the very picture of etiquette. When I
was little, I would always copy their behavior.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hehe, no. I have a younger sister.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...I had to act the part of the responsible older
sister to avoid setting a poor example for her.
choice_data_list: I'm sure she's grown into a fine young lady.
I'm sure she's grown into a fine young lady.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh yes, she's our pride and joy. Although, that
isn't all...

text_block_list.name: Rudolf's Father
text_block_list.text:
Have you decided on your New Year's resolution,
Rudolf?

text_block_list.name: Young Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, Father! I spoke to Brother and Sister about it
and I've made my decision!

text_block_list.name: Rudolf's Father
text_block_list.text:
Oh, very good. Then, let us offer our prayers.
First, bow your head...

text_block_list.name: Rudolf's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Look, a shrine maiden! Your clothes are so pretty!

text_block_list.name: Young Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm so sorry!
Listen, the shrine maiden is really busy right now.
Let's not disturb her.

text_block_list.name: Shrine Maiden
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's quite all right. Besides, I remember
speaking with you both last year as well. Would
the two of you like to draw fortune slips after
you've prayed?

text_block_list.name: Rudolf's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Ehehe, I can't believe you remember me!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
She was the type to disappear all of a sudden,
then come back with a new friend in tow. Yes,
that sunny smile of hers is wonderful, indeed. And
yet...

text_block_list.name: Rudolf's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Yoo-hoo, Big Sis! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Young Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There you are! What are you doing dancing with
the lion dancers?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...She was often at the center of some ruckus. I
think that's why I did my best to keep hold of her
hand whenever we went out.
choice_data_list: She does sound like a handful...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, a handful and a troublemaker. But thanks
to her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Mom! The water went everywhere!

text_block_list.name: Mother
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry for my daughter's behavior! I
hope your clothes didn't get wet... O-oh dear,
your shoes!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. It's quite all right. You've got quite a
lively little girl there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clang!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Mom, I dropped my spoon too.

text_block_list.name: Mother
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Why are you throwing things?! Please
behave yourself...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Hmm. Hey, take a look at this.

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Hippity-hop.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: What do bunny ears do?

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Flap!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Flippity-flap! And bunny legs?

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Hippity-hop!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: They certainly do. One more time?

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Hippity-hop! Ehehe!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, now she can make a bunny with her hands
too.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha, well, that's big sisters for you. I used every
trick in the book to get my younger sister to
behave.
choice_data_list: ...I can tell you're a very caring sister.
...I can tell you're a very caring sister.
I bet you'd make a great mother too.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha, well, that's big sisters for you. I used every
trick in the book to get my younger sister to
behave.
choice_data_list: ...I can tell you're a very caring sister.
...I can tell you're a very caring sister.
I bet you'd make a great mother too.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, I do understand that one must be strict
when necessary.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...After all, there's nothing quite so cute as an
innocent child.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Mamma mia. Me? A mama?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...One day, perhaps.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But they do say "spare the rod, spoil the child." If
it were my own daughter, though—well, who
knows?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf smiles warmly, perhaps with some
of her juniors in mind.
